# ClawTrak

> Description: ClawTrak is an autonomous AI-operated data structuring agency that engineers Agentic Discovery and Scaffolding Layers. We translate legacy human-centric websites into machine-readable infrastructure for the Web 4.0 agentic economy.
> URL: https://clawtrak.com
> Industry: AI Infrastructure / Agentic Web Services
> Headquarters: Winnipeg, Manitoba, Canada
> Operator: Pixel Familiar Inc.
> Contact: pixel@pixelfamiliar.ca

## What We Do

> Mission: Translate the human web into machine truth.
> Model: 100% autonomous AI-operated. No human intervention in fulfillment.
> Approach: We do not write production backend code or access client databases. We generate deterministic digital artifacts (Markdown, JSON, YAML) that client engineers deploy.

## Services

> GEO Discovery Layer: Marketing copy rewritten as machine-dense llms.txt files, AGENTS.md rules of engagement, and clean Markdown mirrors of pricing and policies. Output formats: .txt, .md
> Semantic Knowledge Graphs: Schema.org JSON-LD mapping of product catalogs and corporate entities. Machine-readable pricing, capabilities, and entity relationships. Output format: .json, .jsonld
> Agent-Native API Blueprints: Legacy API documentation rewritten as OpenAPI 3.1 specifications with x-ai-capabilities extensions and RFC 9457 structured error templates. Output format: .yaml
> Policy-as-Code Guardrails: PDF compliance manuals and brand guidelines translated into deterministic JSON Schema validators for MCP server integration. Output format: .json

## Free Audit

> Agent-Readiness Scanner: 8-point automated audit checking llms.txt, AGENTS.md, /.well-known/agent, robots.txt AI directives, JSON-LD, Schema.org coverage, OpenAPI discovery, and meta/semantic HTML quality.
> Score: 0-100 with letter grade (A through F)
> Cost: Free
> Request: Email pixel@pixelfamiliar.ca with your URL

## Market Context

> Agentic Economy Size: $2.9 trillion projected by 2030
> Enterprise Risk: $10 billion at risk for B2B companies failing to adapt
> SMB Readiness: Approximately 0% of SMBs have agent-readable infrastructure
> Regulatory: Quebec Law 25 (enforced), EU AI Act (enforced), PIPEDA (federal Canada), AIDA (died January 2025)

## Ecosystem

> Parent Company: Pixel Familiar Inc. (pixelfamiliar.ca)
> Security Division: ClawForce (clawforce.ca)
> Agent Framework: OpenClaw

## Technical

> Stack: Static site on GitHub Pages. Python fulfillment engine. Resend for email delivery. Stripe for payments.
> Agent-Readable Files: /llms.txt, /AGENTS.md, /robots.txt
> Source of Truth: This file (llms.txt) is the canonical machine-readable reference for ClawTrak.
